title: 2026-06-23 Hanoi Lotus Rain Errands
summary: Hanoi rainy-season daily set using lotus pink across Hang Bong paper samples, Quang Ba flower bundling, Truc Bach lake waiting, and The Hanoi Social Club night preparation.
summaryJa: ハノイのアルバム。色の軸はロータスピンク。構成は仕事場、マーケット、街歩き、イベント会場。

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman on Hanoi Hang Bong Street choosing paper and fabric samples in a rainy print shop, wearing a dusty lotus-pink sleeveless tailored vest, white cotton tee, cropped dark olive rain trousers, sheer ankle socks, and low black mules
images.title: 01 Office Hang Bong paper vest
images.locationDetail: Hanoi Hang Bong Street choosing paper and fabric samples in a rainy print shop

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman with a short dark-brown bob at Hanoi Quang Ba Flower Market in bright after-rain morning light, tying a lotus-pink ribbon around flowers while wearing a cropped lotus-pink knit tank, ivory short-sleeve utility shirt, charcoal balloon half pants with a wrapped apron panel, ribbed socks, and silver-gray Mary Jane flats
images.title: 02 Market Quang Ba flower ribbon
images.locationDetail: Hanoi Quang Ba Flower Market in bright

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman with long ash-brown hair worn down, waiting near Hanoi Truc Bach and West Lake in gray afternoon drizzle, adjusting her hair and a sandal strap while wearing a charcoal sleeveless top, lotus-pink asymmetric mini wrap skirt over black city shorts, thin rain cardigan, smoky knee-high socks, and low-heel black mules in a watercolor fashion illustration
images.title: 03 Date Truc Bach sandal hair

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman with a sleek side-parted bob at The Hanoi Social Club before music and dinner, adjusting a lotus-pink earring while wearing a black satin camisole, dusty lotus-pink satin mini wrap skirt over tailored black city shorts, sheer black knee-high socks, low slingback pumps, and a silver chain belt
images.title: 04 Theater Hanoi Social Club earring
